agency_tasks.title: Reconfigure Aggregated Event Measurement for nordicpirates.com
agency_tasks.detail: Domain is now verified. Set the 8 prioritized web events with Purchase as event #1. This is what unblocks iOS/ATT attribution on our main store. Pixel 832599113757136.

agency_tasks.title: Configure AEM for tap10game.com
agency_tasks.detail: Goal here is signups, NOT purchase. Set Lead / CompleteRegistration as event #1. Purchases happen on Kickstarter + nordicpirates.com, not on tap10. Pixel 26904702632559365.

agency_tasks.title: Add UTM parameters to ALL active Meta ads
agency_tasks.detail: Use the URL parameters field at ad level: utm_source=facebook&utm_medium=paid&utm_campaign={{campaign.name}}&utm_content={{ad.name}} — right now only €35 of €10.7k revenue is attributed to social because this is missing.

agency_tasks.title: Verify Event Match Quality + event_id deduplication
agency_tasks.detail: In Events Manager for pixel 832599113757136, confirm browser Pixel and server-side CAPI events share an event_id so they dedupe. Report the EMQ score for Purchase — we want 7.0+.

agency_tasks.title: Confirm Lead event fires on tap10game.com email signup
agency_tasks.detail: Test the email capture form end-to-end and confirm a Lead event lands in Events Manager (browser + CAPI). Send us a screenshot of the test event.

agency_tasks.title: Audit retargeting audiences
agency_tasks.detail: Website-visitor and purchaser custom audiences currently hold only ~20 members each — they should be in the thousands. Confirm they begin refilling once AEM + UTM fixes are live, and rebuild any that are broken.

agency_tasks.title: Provide Microsoft Clarity project for tap10game.com
agency_tasks.detail: We have Clarity live on nordicpirates.com (ID wuzvreap5g). Create / share the Clarity project ID for tap10game.com and we'll wire the (consent-gated) snippet.

agency_tasks.title: Rename the main pixel (cosmetic)
agency_tasks.detail: Pixel 832599113757136 is still named 'Main - lyingpirates.com Pixel' from the old domain. Rename to 'nordicpirates.com' so the account is unambiguous. No functional impact.
